meaning: 伦弗鲁郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: Two Britons – chief engineer Peter French, from County Durham, and second officer James Grady, from Renfrewshire – are among the crew of 25 who were all reported to be unharmed.
Renfrewshire Council leader Mark Macmillan described the proposal as the best of both worlds.
Local politicians said the news was a serious blow for the people of Renfrewshire.
Joseph Barlas (Greenock, Renfrewshire) - For services to the Inverclyde Voluntary Council of Social Services.
